product.title: Snuffle Mat for Dogs, 17'' x 21'' Dog Sniffing Interactive Feeding Game Boredom, Puzzle Toys Encourages Natural Foraging Skills and Stress Relief Small/Medium/Large Dogs
feature_bullets: 【Dog training toys】It is a unique dog training mat that allows your dog to find snacks or small toys hidden in the mat. It helps to train your dog's smell, consume your dog's energy and lose weight. Keep your dog occupied and avoid your dog being bored and engaged in destructive behavior.

【2 extra suction cups】 It comes with 2 suction cups, you can fix it on the smooth ground. The bottom is a non-slip cloth that effectively holds the mat and prevents the dog from moving the mat when your dog search food on the mat.

【Easy to clean】The main fabric of the scent pad is felt cloth, environmentally friendly and easy to clean. This dog snuffle mat can be washed by hand or machine, we advice to wash it once a week at least to keep your dog’s health.

【Thicker hair and durable edge guard】Longer and thicker hair help you to hide the food better, the edge guard prevent food drop out from the mat. A wonderful snuffle mat can encourage dogs’ natural instinct, let them have fun exploring.

【Safe to use】In order to provide high quality product and let all customers can rest assured purchase. All material are high quality, non-toxic , durable and odorless to make sure will not make your dog uncomfortable. Please contact us for a satisfied solution if there any problems with the item you got.

local.title: Great easy to load and clean snuffle mat
local.text: The media could not be loaded. Snuffle mats are wonderful in general as they promote sniffing, which lowers a dog's pulse and promotes stress reduction. But not all snuffle mats are created equal. This is a great snuffle mat. It is very easy to load. I sprinkle treats or kibble over the mat, shake my fingers through it, and the treats sink to the bottom of the mat which promotes deep sniffing from my dog. Many other snuffle mats have adorable pockets and puzzle features that take a lot of time to put the treats into. This mat lacks the adorable factor, but is way more practical. It really mimics grass, which is nature's snuffle mat. (FYI: If you can't afford a snuffle mat you can throw your dog's kibble or treats in the grass to achieve the exact same thing.) This mat is also easy to clean. Just throw it in the washer and then in the dryer. You're supposed to remove the foam border when you wash and dry it, but I never do and it's been fine. Some dogs will pick up the entire mat and shake the treats out instead of snuffling. There are suction cup attachments that can be added to keep the mat on the floor. However, many dogs (including my own) can pull the suction cups off of the floor. Luckily, my dog is happy to snuffle and doesn't even think to pick up the mat. However, she will chew on the suction cups until they detach from the floor so we just don't use them. I work in an animal shelter and have used and cleaned dozens of different kinds of snuffle mats. This is my favorite snuffle mat for easy and convenient use. Snuffle mats can be used to feed entire meals, but my favorite use for a snuffle mat is to reduce a dog's excitement and/or stress level. When my dog becomes excited by something like fireworks or screaming children, I load up the snuffle mat with tiny treats and watch her sniff her way back to a calmer, more relaxed dog.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 5, 2024

local.title: More Stimulating for Dog than Calculus │ Well Constructed │ SOFT │Washing Machine OK
local.text: The media could not be loaded. Coop is a smart pup and I wanted to throw some challenge in his day to day lounging and ball sessions. As he is an Urban English Springer Spaniel we need activities to keep his sniffer in tip top shape (Will be needed in event of Zombie Apocalypse). The mat itself is large, super soft, and surprisingly well made, with deep enough folds to hide treats or kibble (we used kibble). It’s easy for dogs to sniff out food without getting frustrated, making it a fun, rewarding activity. Coopie did figure out the boon of flipping the mat so we did employ the "Stick-on" cups once that occurred. PROS✅ Gym for the ol' Sniffer✅ Super soft and gentle materials✅ Easy Clean - washing machine OK CONS❌ Not Suction Cups - they are "Stick-on" cups meaning once the adhesive is applied, you cant really move them around/reposition. TIPS💡 Pick a Permanent Spot - the adhesive cups aren't re-locatable/reusable💡 Start Easy - place treats at top and then make it more difficult.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 31, 2025

local.title: A bit floppy, but keeps our dog entertained.
local.text: Keeps our dog working for a bit. Decent design, but I wish it was a bit deeper and more compact between the tufts, so the challenge was more difficult, but our dog is a hound, so her sniffer is pretty darn good. It is a soft mat, so imagine it handles like an extra thick bathmat. It doesn't have a solid base or foundation. When you pick it up to fill it with food or treats, you need to support underneath it, or everything will just fall to the floor. That said, it's easy to toss into the washing machine.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 10, 2025

local.title: Great product
local.text: This snuffle mat is amazing! It takes my dogs a lot longer to eat and it’s much better than a slow feeder which my dogs can figure out quite easily. I bought the small size which is definitely big enough for 30-40 lbs dogs. This is durable and easy to use. I do wish it was a bit cheaper price wise.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2026

local.title: Love this for my pup!
local.text: I got this 20x28 shuffle mat for my 8 Mos old GSD Puppy. He needs mind stimulation and this is a great way to give him his afternoon meal in a slow way while also making his use his brain rather than inhaling it! He worked wntire mat over several times and managed to find every piece of food without lifting up the mat and tossing it as I was concerned he would. The suction things don't work, or they don't work with our floor or I'm not using them right! Regardless, its heavy enough to stay on the ground as he works through it. Once he is finished he sits and waits for me to check it for anything left over. I encourage him to "find it" if there are a few left over and he goes back to working it. He was able to find them all quickly. He really enjoys it! We'll see how long it lasts but this is definitely something I see as worth it for his mental stimulation!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 27, 2025

local.title: Suction cups aren't dependable, but dog approved either way!
local.text: The mat is great for my dog's enrichment, however the suction cups did not work well which made it easy for my dog to chew on. Fortunately the mat works well by itself, so we can continue using it, but the suction cups were a selling point for us.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 17, 2025

local.title: Great product for high energy/fast eating dogs
local.text: This is exactly the quality I was expecting from the description. The kibble doesn’t hide as well in the fibers as I was hoping but it still takes out pup quite a while to find it all and then he is tuckered out by the end of it. Perfect for dogs that need more mental stimulation. Very soft, and he hasn’t even tried to chew it up
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 18, 2025

global.title: Dog snuffle mat

global.title: Good for keeping dogs entertained
global.text: Dogs love finding treats in this mat ,engages their nose and makes it a bit more interesting for them at treat time ,well made

global.title: Robust and effective
global.text: This is far from the first snuffle mat that I have bought for my dog. it seems more robust. The others started to look very tired very fast. Of necessity snuffle mats get dirty quickly. this one is more robust, and doesn’t look as if it has been dragged around the fields after having been washed. the more upright nature of the individual ‘fingers’ means that treats are more easily hidden.This mat is very much enjoyed by my inquisitive, perpetually hungry/activity seeking cocker.
global.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 14, 2025
